{{/* Renders an object's immediate fields as .api-field rows (apiBuilder/field). Used for the Spec/Status sections and each promoted-type section. Parameters: props (properties map), required (list), path (dotted path root), kind (CRD kind) */}}
{{ $req := .required }} {{ $path := .path }} {{ $kind := .kind }} {{ range $key, $val := .props }} {{ partial "apiBuilder/field" (dict "key" $key "contents" $val "path" $path "kind" $kind "required" (in $req $key)) }} {{ end }}
